title: LCCC Celebrates Record-Breaking Allocation Round 6 (AR6) With Largest Number of Contracts Signed
content: The Low Carbon Contracts Company (LCCC) set a record in Allocation Round 6 (AR6) by signing 130 contracts, adding 9.58 GW of renewable capacity and raising the total CfD portfolio to 34.74 GW. AR6 features diverse technologies, including offshore wind, tidal, and solar, advancing the UK's Net Zero goals and energy security. Notable projects include ScottishPower's Â£4 billion East Anglia TWO offshore windfarm, set to power nearly one million homes by 2028/29. This achievement underscores the maturity of renewable energy technologies and LCCC's commitment to facilitating private investment and timely project delivery.
author: Analysts Account
